description:
{{Feature|obsolete|Use [[ctrlAddEventHandler]] instead.}}
Set the action of a control of the currently active user dialog. The script statement is executed on button release and {{hl|_this}} is available, but contains ""; See [[Arma: GUI Configuration]] for more information about user dialogs. Works with:
* [[CT_BUTTON]]
* [[CT_XBUTTON]]
* [[CT_ACTIVETEXT]]
* [[CT_SHORTCUTBUTTON]]
examples: <sqf>_ctrl buttonSetAction "if (alive bob) then {hint 'alive'} else {hint 'dead'}"; // SQF but SQS compatible, see SQS</sqf>

Script is [[SQS Syntax|SQS]]:
<sqs>_control buttonSetAction "hint format ['Is SQS: %1', !isNil '_time']"</sqs>
name: buttonSetAction

Item.desc: [[SQS Syntax|SQS]] code body that should be executed when the button/active text is clicked
Item.name: action

Item.desc: [[SQS Syntax|SQS]] code body that should be executed when the button/active text is clicked
Item.name: action
